# Licenses

The `agent-*.png` sprites in this directory are derivative works of
Universal LPC Spritesheet Character Generator assets. **They are NOT covered
by the repository's MIT license.**

Every source sheet used here is multi-licensed by its authors under:

- **CC-BY-SA 3.0** — <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/>
- **GPL 3.0** — <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html>
- **OGA-BY 3.0** — <https://static.opengameart.org/OGA-BY-3.0.txt>

(see `ATTRIBUTIONS.md` for the per-file license lists copied from the
generator's `CREDITS.csv`).

These composed sprites are distributed under **CC-BY-SA 3.0**, chosen from
the licenses offered by the upstream authors. That means:

- **Attribution** — keep `ATTRIBUTIONS.md` (the full author list) with any
  redistribution of these PNGs;
- **ShareAlike** — derivatives of these sprites must be licensed under
  CC-BY-SA 3.0 (or a compatible license) as well.

The original office-chair pixels drawn behind the figures by
`tools/compose-lpc-agents.mjs` are original to this repository and are
contributed into the combined images under the same CC-BY-SA 3.0 terms.

Everything else in this repository (code, generated tiles/props, maps,
docs) remains MIT — see the `LICENSE` file at the repo root.
